requirement_topic.en: Safety and Desert Environmental Suitability — IEC 62109, SNE Conformity, Heat and Dust Derating
requirement_topic.zh: 安全与沙漠环境适用性——IEC 62109、SNE合规、热与粉尘降额
requirement_topic.zht: 安全與沙漠環境適用性——IEC 62109、SNE合規、熱與粉塵降額

summary.en: Chad PV inverter documentation should follow SNE project expectations and IEC-aligned safety evidence. IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are central for inverter safety and utility-interface behavior. Project deliverables should additionally prove desert suitability: high-ambient operation limits, dust ingress management, thermal derating strategy, and enclosure or cooling design choices.
summary.zh: 乍得光伏逆变器文件应遵循SNE项目要求与IEC对齐的安全证据。IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是逆变器安全与电网接口行为的核心。项目资料还应额外证明沙漠适应性，包括高温运行范围、粉尘侵入控制、热降额策略、外壳与散热设计。
summary.zht: 乍得光伏逆變器文件應遵循SNE項目要求與IEC對齊的安全證據。IEC 62109-1與IEC 62109-2是逆變器安全與電網介面行為核心。項目資料還應額外證明沙漠適應性，包括高溫運行範圍、粉塵入侵控制、熱降額策略、外殼與散熱設計。

standards_or_laws: SNE conformity route for regulated project-connected PV equipment
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2
Project-level environmental assumptions: heat and dust derating, enclosure and cooling

summary.en: Chinese documentation commonly uses GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024. These documents support baseline electrical quality, but they do not automatically satisfy Chad project gates. They should be mapped to IEC 62109 clauses and local climate assumptions before project submission.
summary.zh: 中国通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024形成技术文件，这对基线电气质量有帮助。中国文件不能自动满足乍得项目门槛，在提交前应映射到IEC 62109条款及当地气候假设。
summary.zht: 中國通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024形成技術文件，這對基礎電氣品質有幫助。中國文件不能自動滿足乍得項目門檻，在提交前應映射到IEC 62109條款及當地氣候假設。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定

gap.en: Gap: Chinese documentation should be remapped to Chad project assumptions. Export readiness requires IEC 62109 clause mapping, heat-derating curves for hot-arid operation, and explicit dust ingress and maintenance-access documentation.
gap.zh: 差距：中国文件应按乍得项目假设重新映射。出货准备需要IEC 62109条款映射、适用于热带/高温干旱工况的热降额曲线，以及粉尘入侵和维护通道文件。
gap.zht: 差距：中國文件應按乍得項目假設重新映射。出貨準備需要IEC 62109條款映射、適用於熱帶/高溫乾旱工況的熱降額曲線，以及粉塵入侵和維護通道文件。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific and commonly required where SNE or project specifications require IEC 62109 and environment suitability evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese documentation is preparatory; project-facing IEC mapping is required

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on Chinese reports alone for Chad acceptance. Prepare IEC 62109 evidence with local hot-dry climate assumptions, thermal derating, and dust ingress controls in the project dossier.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不可只依赖中国报告完成乍得验收。需在项目资料中补充IEC 62109证据、当地高热旱环境假设、热降额和粉尘入侵控制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不可只依賴中國報告完成乍得驗收。需在專案資料中補充IEC 62109證據、當地高熱乾環境假設、熱降額和粉塵入侵控制。
